rationale: The vocabulary reading is exactly a signature (def:signature). The formal-language reading defines L(Sigma) as Terms(Sigma) union WFF(Sigma), so terms (def:term) and well-formed formulas (def:wff-pred) are constitutive, not ambient. Both were missing.
notes: Layering caution for the deterministic checker: def:term and def:wff-pred are built over the signature Sigma here (not over 'language'), so locally there is no cycle; verify the global edges don't make terms/WFF depend back on def:language. def:variable is an explicit constituent of the alphabet (V, countable) and is a candidate edge, left off as it is folded into terms/WFF.
